Home > For Digital Leaders
For Enterprise Digital Leaders

Every rotating asset. One signal. Full visibility.

Electrical Signature Analysis scales condition monitoring across your entire fleet. Monitor 100 percent of assets from electrical infrastructure you already own. Eliminate blind spots, reduce risk, control costs.

Talk to Us About Enterprise Scale See the Platform Architecture

The monitoring gap is a strategic risk. SAM4 is your answer at scale.

Enterprise fleets operate under a hard constraint: 30 to 40 percent of rotating assets sit beyond traditional sensor reach. Remote wells, distributed plants, offshore facilities. Your team can't place sensors everywhere. But electrical current flows through every motor. This is your blind spot. And with ABB's partnership, it's now your competitive advantage. SAM4 deployed across your enterprise becomes a fleet of AI reliability engineers that scale expertise humans cannot.

AI reliability engineers. At 10,000 assets.

SAM4 runs Electrical Signature Analysis from your motor control centers. No hardware retrofits. No installation headaches. Current signature detection identifies the same faults as vibration, earlier. Because it reads from electrical cabinets instead of machine surfaces, you reach every motor in your network. 10,000 assets. 80 customers. 5 continents. One platform.

See how ESA scales →

Outcomes that matter at board level.

Fleet-Wide Visibility

Monitor 100 percent of your rotating assets. Close the blind spot with one system, one signal, one platform.

Learn more →

Operational Risk Reduction

Detect faults before failure. Eliminate unplanned downtime. Control your maintenance rhythm across the fleet.

See customer results →

Maintenance Cost Optimisation

Replace when needed, not by calendar. Extend asset life. Reduce spare parts and unplanned replacement spending.

See customer results →

Energy & ESG Improvement

Healthy assets run efficiently. Detect efficiency loss early. Improve carbon footprint and energy outcomes.

Energy strategy →

Trusted at enterprise scale. ABB partnership validated.

Payback period

"Condition monitoring was strategically necessary but operationally impossible at our scale. SAM4 gave us visibility into tens of thousands of assets using infrastructure we already owned. The impact on maintenance strategy and unplanned downtime has been transformational."

VP Operations, Global Enterprise Customer

See enterprise customer stories →

Built for enterprise architecture and governance.

SAM4 integrates into your IT infrastructure without disruption. API-first architecture. Non-intrusive deployment. Enterprise-grade security. CMMS integration for automated workflows.

Integration

CMMS Integration

Connect to SAP, Maximo, Infor, or any CMMS via API. Alerts become work orders. Condition data flows into maintenance planning automatically.

See integrations →
Security

Enterprise Grade

ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certified. SOC 2 Type II compliant. End-to-end encryption. Role-based access. Audit logs for governance.

See security docs →
Deployment

Non-Intrusive. Scalable.

MCC-mounted hardware. No production changes. Current transformer taps. Read-only from switchgear. Deploy across 10,000 assets with zero downtime.

See deployment approach →

"We manage thousands of distributed assets across continents. Traditional monitoring wasn't economically viable at scale. SAM4 lets us monitor everything from electrical infrastructure we already control. We've moved from reactive maintenance to predictive across the entire fleet."

Digital Transformation Director, Multi-Plant Operator

See all enterprise customer stories →
